name: AI Privacy Boundary
rules: Private data must never leave the local machine
Use parseWithOllama for any client PII, financials, allergies, messages
Never use parseWithAI as a fallback — if Ollama is offline, hard-fail
OllamaOfflineError must always be re-thrown, never swallowed
Heuristic/regex fallbacks (no LLM call) are acceptable
Private data includes: names, contact info, dietary restrictions, budgets, quotes, payments, analytics, temp logs, staff data
